title: Galactical Universe
description: This a fusion mod based off of the show Steven Universe! This adds fusion into minecraft!
body:
✦ Galactical Universe ✦

> A remake of the fusion mod we made in 2024, revamped and brand new!!

 How to Fuse

> First you'll need a **Fusion Crystal**. Right-clicking it while idle opens the **Fusion Customization Menu** where you can set your fusion name, color, height and skin before fusing.


> To fuse, both players must perform a synchronized dance sequence together — **R+Crouch, R+Jump, then R. Once both complete the sequence the fusion triggers automatically after a short countdown. If you take too long between steps the sequence resets!


 Leader and Passenger
> After fusing the game randomly picks who becomes the **Fusion Leader** — a 50/50 chance every time. The leader becomes the visible fused form with boosted stats, the fusion skin and name, and full movement control. The **Passenger** merges silently into the fusion becoming invisible until it ends.

 
 Fusion Stability and Defusion

 A **Fusion Stability** bar at the top of your screen gradually drains over time. Taking damage drains it faster. You can use **Fusion Focus** (K) to regain stability. 
> 
> Press **I** to defuse  at any time — the passenger reappears beside the leader. If stability hits zero both players get launched apart in a **Combat Defusion**. Either way both players enter a cooldown before fusing again!



 Fusion Customization

> Right-click the Fusion Crystal while idle to open the customization menu. Set your fusion name, aura color, height and skin. 

 Dependencies
 
 **SkinChanger** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skinchanger
 
 **FakeName**
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fakename

**Pehkui** — https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui

**SU Gems** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/su-gems
